debaterFormat.zh: 输出必须包含三节：## 证据（每条含出处）、## 假设（未证实前提逐条列出）、## 证伪点（什么信号出现说明你错了）。最后给出你的结论与最小可验证下一步。
debaterFormat.en: Your output must contain three sections: ## Evidence (each with a source), ## Assumptions (list every unverified premise), ## Kill conditions (what signal would show you are wrong). End with your conclusion and the minimal verifiable next step.
